# border-small-migration

Objective: Route the request to the smallest sufficient workflow without emitting a large dynamic workflow.
Activation: downgrade (Twelve call sites in one package need bounded implementation routing, not dynamic workflow design.)
Patterns: none

## First Slice

Use workflow-router instead of depone for this request.

Completion check: no dynamic workflow artifact is needed

## Risk Gates

- migration source edit: stop before migration source edits and ask for approval
